LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, L.P.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 11, 2025, TO ALLOW OPPOSING PARTY ONE FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPIES OF HIS PAPERS NO LATER THAN JULY 7, 2025, AT 11 A.M. ON JUNE 26, 2025, COURT STAFF EMAILED ALL PARTIES, INSTRUCTING PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THESE PAPERS BY JUNE 27, 2025. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IGNORED THE EMAIL AND FAILED TO COMPLY. FURTHER DISREGARD OF THIS COURT'S LOCAL RULES WILL RESULT IN AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING SANCTIONS. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

COURT CONFIRMS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS TO THE 2ND, 3RD AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND TAKES UNDER SUBMISSION THE MOTION AS TO THE 1ST, 4TH, 5TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-23-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Ali Sachani, Esq., JAURIGUE LAW GROUP 818.630.7280 ali@jlglawyers.com Attorney for Plaintiff SERGIO CRUZ
THOMAS M. MCINERNEY, ESQ., SMOAK & STEWART, P.C. 415-442-4810 thomas.mcinerney@ogletree.com Attorney for Defendant PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, L.P.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, L.P. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication. Court orally issues a tentative ruling granting motion as to punitive damages. Court confirms the tentative ruling as to the 2nd, 3rd and 7th causes of action and punitive damages and takes under submission the motion as to the 1st, 4th, 5th and 6th causes of action.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Continued To Jul-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, L.P.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication.

Continued to July 11, 2025, to allow opposing party one final opportunity to submit courtesy copies of his papers no later than July 7, 2025, at 11 a.m. On June 26, 2025, court staff emailed all parties, instructing Plaintiff to provide these papers by June 27, 2025. Plaintiff's counsel ignored the email and failed to comply. Further disregard of this court's Local Rules will result in an order to show cause regarding sanctions.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Set For Trial On Aug-04-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
